Container.Name: broccoli_surrealdb
Container.Overview: SurrealDB database service for apps like Open Notebook. Runs the `surreal start` command and exposes port 8000, including the WebSocket RPC endpoint used by Open Notebook.

Config.Name: HTTP / RPC Port
Config.Description: Container Port: 8000 — SurrealDB HTTP + WebSocket RPC endpoint (/rpc).

Config.Name: SurrealDB Log Level
Config.Description: SurrealDB log level (use info in production).

Config.Name: SurrealDB User
Config.Description: Root username for clients such as Open Notebook.

Config.Name: SurrealDB Password
Config.Description: Required. Set a strong password and reuse it in Open Notebook's SURREAL_PASSWORD.

Config.Name: SurrealDB Storage Path
Config.Description: Persistent local database path in the container.
